title: Default Configurations & Unpatched Vulnerabilities
description: Using default configurations and a lack of regular patching creates a significant vulnerability. Attackers could exploit known vulnerabilities or misconfigurations to gain elevated privileges and potentially take control of the system.
attack_vector: Exploiting known vulnerabilities in the underlying software, leveraging default credentials, or misconfigured permissions.
mitigations: Conduct a thorough vulnerability assessment and penetration testing.
Implement a robust patch management process.
Harden system configurations by disabling unnecessary services and ports.
